title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo—CLI and Go library to pull, build, and run Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with GPU/Metal acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, generate, embed, pull, and list operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration providing Ollama LLM, chat, and embed interfaces with tool-calling support.

title: LlamaIndex Ollama Integration
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedder implementations that talk to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (now Open-WebUI) that plugs into Ollama; offers folders, sharing, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library exposing Ollama endpoints with POJO model mapping and reactive streams.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that adds conversation history, markdown export, and prompt templates on top of Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models onto Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain to chat over your documents offline.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation that builds Ollama and bundles CUDA/ROCm runtimes for reproducible local deployments.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile collection (Llama 3, Phi-3, CodeLlama, SQLCoder, etc.) with build instructions.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that calls Ollama for local AI-assisted note summarization and continuation.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into threads with slash commands and model switching.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI pipelines needing local LLM calls.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration that exposes Ollama as a REST client bean with YAML model selection.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama HTTP API with serde types.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and Blazor sample that wraps Ollama endpoints with IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components for pipelines.
